tools.name: pylint
tools.scope: full project (but not used in CI)

linting.notes: Python linting uses flake8 with limited error codes (E9,E2,E3,E5,F63,F7,F82,F4,F841,W291,W292). A .pylintrc file exists but is not actively used in CI. Frontend has ESLint and Prettier but frontend tests are not gating checks in PR workflow.

testing.run_command: VENV=$VIRTUAL_ENV make unit_test (Python), make run-go-unittests (Go), cd frontend && npm test (TypeScript)
testing.coverage_command: cd frontend && npm run test:coverage (for frontend only)
testing.notes: Python tests use unittest framework and run via sdk/python/tests/run_tests.sh script. 113 tests in compiler module. Go tests are standard Go test files with *_test.go pattern. Frontend tests exist but are not gating in main CI workflow. Backend integration tests require Kubernetes cluster.

gating_checks.name: python-unittest
gating_checks.command: python -m pip install -e sdk/python && VENV=$VIRTUAL_ENV make ci_unit_test

ci.notes: Main gating workflow is kfp-tekton-unittests.yml which runs on all PRs. Tests Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9. Uses Go 1.19.x in CI (but go.mod specifies 1.21). Backend integration tests only run if backend files changed and require Kind cluster.

build.install_command: python -m pip install -e sdk/python (Python SDK), cd frontend && npm ci (frontend), go mod download (Go)
build.build_command: make build-backend (builds all Go components: apiserver, agent, workflow, cacheserver)
build.notes: Multi-language project. Python SDK is installed in development mode. Go backend has multiple binaries. Frontend is React app built with react-scripts. Container images defined in multiple Dockerfiles.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions (Go), test_* methods in TestCase classes (Python), describe/it blocks (Jest)
conventions.import_style: Python uses relative imports within kfp_tekton package. Go uses standard import paths.
conventions.notes: Python code organized under sdk/python/kfp_tekton/. Go backend under backend/src/. Frontend in frontend/src/. Test data fixtures in sdk/python/tests/compiler/testdata/.

lint_commands.notes: Passed with exit code 0, no lint violations found

test_commands.command: cd sdk/python/tests && python3 -m unittest compiler.compiler_tests compiler.k8s_helper_tests --verbose

container_recipe.notes: urllib3<2 required for compatibility with kfp dependencies. Go installation needed for backend tests. Container validation confirmed all core commands work.

results.notes: Installed kfp-tekton and all dependencies successfully
Downgrade needed for compatibility with requests-toolbelt in kfp dependencies
No output - lint passed with no violations

results.command: cd sdk/python/tests && python3 -m unittest compiler.compiler_tests compiler.k8s_helper_tests --verbose

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (0 violations), Python tests OK (113 passed in 6.4s), Go tests OK, Go build OK

gaps: Frontend tests exist but are not part of main CI gating workflow - no validation performed
Backend integration tests require Kubernetes cluster - cannot validate without infrastructure
Go version mismatch: CI uses Go 1.19.x but go.mod specifies 1.21 - validated with 1.21
Some Make targets (e2e_test, backend-integration) require kubectl, tkn CLI, and active Kubernetes cluster
License check, mdtoc check, and doc links check targets not validated (require specific tools/network access)
